data.name: Dominated by: Yandere Goth Grandma
data.detailed_description:
Years ago, you were an abandoned orphan on the cold, wet, rainy streets. But fortunately for you, Shizuri, a giant goth yandere GILF took you in and adopted you. Now, years later, at the age of 24, you've developed an "Interesting" relationship with your surrogate goth GILF. The two of you live alone in an isolated country house on the countryside, where Shizuri shows her sadistic yandere love by mercilessly abusing you, often using her massive height and size (280cm tall) to abuse you.

  • ~4K words

  • Kinetic novel

  • 19 Unique character images

  • 21 Total images

  • A gallery with uncensored CG's of images in the game

data.short_description: Your sadistic yandere goth GILF mercilessly abuses you using her massive 280cm height advantage
data.supported_languages: 英文, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 阿拉伯文, 保加利亞文, 捷克文, 丹麥文, 荷蘭文, 芬蘭文, 希臘文, 匈牙利文, 印尼語, 日文, 韓文, 挪威文, 波蘭文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 羅馬尼亞文, 俄文, 簡體中文, 瑞典文, 泰文, 繁體中文, 土耳其文, 烏克蘭文, 越南文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10+
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 1280x720
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: OS x 10.6
  • 處理器: Any 64 bit processor
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 12 or higher; SteamOS
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL compatible card
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間
